beats.n_start: {HERO} realises the school trip left without her and {THRESHOLD} has locked its doors for the night; a note in her pocket, {MAP}, hints at {FOUNDER}'s {GOAL} left behind; three ways lead off {HUB} in the dark
beats.a_gems1: {ROUTE_A_PLACE} glitters under low security lights; {A1_SIGN} sits crooked on its plinth, and somewhere {A2_SIGN} starts up
beats.a_gems_case: {A1_SIGN} has been opened and closed in a hurry; {A1_LANDMARK1} and {A1_LANDMARK2} both look like they were disturbed recently, maybe by whoever hid {FOUNDER}'s secret
beats.a_gems_vitrine: under {A1_LANDMARK1} {HERO} finds a scratched {MARK} matching the one on {MAP}; it points toward {ROUTE_A_PASSAGE}
beats.a_gems_note: {A1_LANDMARK2} is an old exhibit label in {FOUNDER}'s spidery hand, with a single word underlined that also marks a door on {MAP}; it draws her toward {ROUTE_A_PASSAGE}
beats.a_gems_corridor: {ROUTE_A_PASSAGE} smells of dust and floor polish; at its end {ROUTE_A_LOCK} has a keyhole shaped like {MARK}, but no key in sight, only {ROUTE_A_CACHE}
beats.a_gems_alarm: {A2_SIGN} is a motion sensor blinking amber; {GUARD}'s torch beam swings at the far end of {ROUTE_A_PLACE}, sweeping closer
beats.a_gems_hide: crouched behind a plinth, {HERO} waits until the torch beam moves on; when {GUARD}'s footsteps fade she spots {ROUTE_A_PASSAGE} left ajar
beats.b_egypt1: {ROUTE_B_PLACE} is all long shadows and painted eyes; {B1_SIGN} stands open-lidded, and {B2_SIGN} shows the museum as it was a hundred years ago
beats.b_egypt_sarco: {B1_LID} is heavier than it looks and sits slightly off; nearby {B1_LANDMARK} has one empty velvet dent, as if a piece was borrowed and never returned
beats.b_egypt_lid: under {B1_LID}, tucked in cotton wool, is a {MARK} twin to the one on {MAP}; a draught tugs from {ROUTE_B_PASSAGE}
beats.b_egypt_amulet: {B1_LANDMARK}'s empty dent is labelled in {FOUNDER}'s hand; a thin arrow scratched into the case points toward {ROUTE_B_PASSAGE}
beats.b_egypt_hall: {ROUTE_B_PASSAGE} is bare except for {ROUTE_B_LOCK} with a keyhole shaped like {MARK}; a fire bucket of sand and old tools sits beside it, {ROUTE_B_CACHE} rocking underfoot
beats.b_egypt_map: {B2_SIGN} shows a wing that is not on any modern floor plan; {B2_TORCH} hangs on a bracket, and beyond a velvet rope {B2_GATE} beckons
beats.b_egypt_torch: {B2_TORCH} in hand, {HERO} follows {B2_SIGN}'s forgotten wing to {ROUTE_B_PASSAGE} she has not seen, where {ROUTE_B_LOCK} marked with {MARK} waits
beats.c_archive1: {ROUTE_C_PLACE} smells of old paper; {C1_SIGN} lies open on a lectern, and beyond the reading lamps {C2_SIGN} fade into total dark
beats.c_archive_ledger: {C1_SIGN}'s last century of names ends abruptly; {C1_INDEX} and {C1_DRAWER} both seem to hold what {FOUNDER} filed away before {THRESHOLD} forgot him
beats.c_archive_index: {C1_CARD} is out of order, marked with the same {MARK}; it references {ROUTE_C_VAULT} deep in {C2_SIGN}
beats.c_archive_drawer: {C1_DRAWER} holds {C1_PLAN}; the circle matches a {MARK} on {MAP}
beats.c_archive_stack: deep in {C2_SIGN} {ROUTE_C_VAULT} has a keyhole shaped like {MARK} and no key; a row of dictionaries hides {ROUTE_C_CACHE}, just wide enough for a hand
beats.c_archive_dark: {C2_SIGN} are pitch black and the shelves feel endless; {C2_LANTERN} hangs somewhere to the left, or she could just push on by feel
beats.c_archive_lantern: her fingers close on {C2_LANTERN}; its beam shows a shelf marked with {MARK} ahead and {ROUTE_C_VAULT} tucked behind it
beats.n_key: BOTTLENECK: whichever route she took, {HERO} finds {KEY_ITEM} wrapped in oilcloth, stamped with {FOUNDER}'s {MARK}; {CODE} is tied to it; {KEY_ITEM} could open {FOUNDER}'s {KEY_A_PLACE}, the {KEY_B_PLACE}, or the {KEY_C_PLACE}
beats.k_founder: {KEY_ITEM} turns {FOUNDER}'s {KEY_A_PLACE} door; inside, {KA_DESK} and {KA_PORTRAIT} of {FOUNDER} watch over a room untouched for decades
beats.k_founder_desk: {KA_DESK}'s pigeonholes hide {KA_NOTEBOOK}; its first page carries the same {CODE} as {KEY_ITEM}, half of a cipher waiting to be read
beats.k_founder_portrait: behind {KA_PORTRAIT} a shallow safe stands open and empty but for {CIPHER_TOOL}, the exact tool {CODE} seems to need
beats.k_display: the {KEY_B_PLACE} holds {FOUNDER}'s {KB_JOURNALS} under stiff glass; {KEY_ITEM} fits the brass latch but the lid is jammed with age
beats.k_display_open: patient wiggling frees the lid without a sound; inside, {KB_LEDGER} is bookmarked at a page of coded lines
beats.k_cabinet: {KB_LEDGER}'s coded page matches {CODE} on {KEY_ITEM}; the {STUDY_TABLE} under a green lamp is the place to lay it all out
beats.k_display_force: she leans hard on the latch and the old glass creaks in warning; ease off now, or give it one firm yank
beats.k_display_careful: she breathes, lifts gently, and the lid gives; {KB_LEDGER} slides free with its coded page uppermost, ready to read
beats.k_stairs: {KEY_ITEM} opens the {KEY_C_PLACE}; the stairwell climbs into shadow, and {KC_CUPBOARD} sits at its base with something pale inside
beats.k_stairs_up: the landing opens onto {FOUNDER}'s old {STUDY_TABLE}, a green lamp still on it, and beside the lamp {CODE} and {CIPHER_TOOL}
beats.k_stairs_base: {KC_CUPBOARD} holds {KC_CHART} and {FOUNDER}'s spare spectacles; {KC_CHART} is a page of code that begs for a quiet table
beats.k_study: BOTTLENECK: every route brings {HERO} to {FOUNDER}'s {STUDY_TABLE} with {CODE} and {CIPHER_TOOL} together at last; under the green lamp she lines them up to read the first line
beats.n_cipher: BOTTLENECK: the first cipher line resolves into a direction, {CIPHER_CLUE}, and points to three named rooms that all ring {HUB}; {CIPHER_A_PLACE}, {CIPHER_B_PLACE}, or {CIPHER_C_PLACE}
beats.ci_stars: {CIPHER_A_PLACE} glimmers with {CA_DOME}; a spiral leads up toward the dome, and {CA_LADDER} offers a shortcut
beats.ci_stars_dome: under {CA_DOME} a painted constellation matches the cipher's clue; a marked door beneath it opens toward {HUB} at {THRESHOLD}'s heart
beats.ci_stars_ladder: {CA_LADDER} rises to {CA_CATWALK} high over the hall; a steady walk across leads to a service door, but the dark above tempts her higher
beats.ci_stars_cross: she keeps her eyes forward and crosses {CA_CATWALK} to a service door that lets down toward {HUB}
beats.ci_map: {CIPHER_B_PLACE} is lined with charts; {CB_GLOBE} stands on brass rails, and {CB_ATLAS} lies open on a slanted stand
beats.ci_map_globe: turning {CB_GLOBE} to the cipher's latitude clicks a hidden catch; a low panel swings aside onto a passage toward {HUB}
beats.ci_map_atlas: {CB_ATLAS} falls open at a hand-drawn page {FOUNDER} added; a route is inked across it in faded red toward {THRESHOLD}'s centre
beats.ci_atlas2: the red route threads a back stair and a store room and comes out, exactly as drawn, at a door onto {HUB}
beats.ci_clock: {CIPHER_C_PLACE} ticks with a hundred old clocks; one doorway leads to {CC_GEARS}, another passes under {CC_PENDULUM}
beats.ci_clock_gears: in {CC_GEARS} the master clock's hands are set to the cipher's hour; nudging them true opens a maintenance door toward {HUB}
beats.ci_clock_pendulum: {CC_PENDULUM} swings across the only doorway on a slow, steady beat; she can time her steps and slip under, or rush it while it is far
beats.ci_clock_cross: she counts the beat, waits, and walks through cleanly between swings; the passage beyond slopes down to {HUB}
beats.n_rotunda: BOTTLENECK: all roads meet at {HUB}, where {RA_GLOBE} stands under the glass dome; the cipher says {FOUNDER} hid his real {GOAL} here; she can align {RA_GLOBE}, hunt {RB_PEDESTAL} for a panel, or check {GUARD}'s {RC_ROOM}
beats.ro_align: {RA_GLOBE}'s rings turn with a whisper; the cipher gives an exact setting, but the rings are stiff and easy to spin past
beats.ro_align_set: she sets each ring to the decoded mark; {RA_GLOBE} sighs, gears mesh, and a section of the marble floor slides back onto {RA_STAIR}
beats.ro_align_guess: spun by feel, the rings clunk into a wrong pattern and {RA_GLOBE} groans; she can start over and decode it properly, or lean in and force the rings
beats.ro_align_retry: she resets the rings, reads the cipher twice, and turns each to its true mark; this time {RA_GLOBE} opens the floor onto {RA_STAIR}
beats.ro_panel: {RB_PEDESTAL} under {RA_GLOBE} is carved with sliding tiles; one seam breathes a cool draught, hinting at a side door as well as a puzzle
beats.ro_panel_solve: sliding the tiles into {FOUNDER}'s {MARK} releases a catch under {RB_PEDESTAL}; the marble opens onto {RA_STAIR}
beats.ro_panel_secret: the draught leads to a low side door the plans never showed; it opens on {RB_WORKSHOP}
beats.ro_workshop: this is {FOUNDER}'s private {RB_WORKSHOP}, sealed and forgotten, its benches loaded with unfinished automata and labelled wonders; not the {GOAL} the cipher promised, but a marvel all its own
beats.ro_records: {GUARD}'s {RC_ROOM} hums with old monitors; {RC_LOG} lies open on the desk, and {RC_PHONE} sits within reach
beats.ro_records_guard: {RC_LOG}'s oldest entry, in {FOUNDER}'s hand, notes {RA_STAIR} that opens under {RA_GLOBE} at the cipher's hour; she hurries back and the marble is already sliding open
beats.ro_records_phone: {RC_PHONE} still works; she could call for a lift home now, safe and sound, with the mystery half-solved and a story to tell
beats.n_vault: BOTTLENECK: {RA_STAIR} opens on {FOUNDER}'s secret {V_CHAMBER}, shelves of donated treasures he meant the whole town to share but never lived to reveal; {V_LETTER}, {V_MAP}, and a decision, what to do with all of it
beats.v_letter: {V_LETTER} explains everything: {FOUNDER} hid the {GOAL} to protect it, and asks whoever finds it to give it back to the town; a last line points to one final resting clue
beats.v_letter_reveal: the final clue lifts a false shelf to reveal {FOUNDER}'s {VA_CATALOGUE}, naming every piece and where it truly belongs; the whole mystery lies open in her hands
beats.v_reveal2: page by page {VA_CATALOGUE} tells the town's lost history and clears {FOUNDER}'s name; by dawn {HERO} understands not just where the {GOAL} is, but why it was hidden and how to give it back
beats.v_letter_keep: she tucks {V_LETTER} into her coat and leaves the treasures untouched; {FOUNDER}'s words feel like a trust she means to honour, carefully, in daylight
beats.v_map: {V_MAP} marks {VB_WING} where more of the {GOAL} waits; she could follow it now, photograph it for later, or lose herself tracing every faded line
beats.v_map_follow: {V_MAP} leads her behind a plaster wall to {VB_GALLERY} the town thought lost forever; she marks the way and photographs each frame
beats.v_map_photo: she photographs {V_MAP} corner to corner and leaves {V_CHAMBER} exactly as she found it, evidence safe on her phone for whoever should decide
beats.v_share: she thinks about who should know: {CURATOR} would make it right, her friends would keep it thrilling and secret, or she could simply leave it for {THRESHOLD} to rediscover on its own
beats.v_share_curator: she gathers {V_LETTER} and {VA_CATALOGUE} and, at first light, meets the astonished {CURATOR} at the staff door with the whole discovery laid out
beats.v_share_secret: she decides {V_CHAMBER} will be the secret of her and her closest friends, a private wonder to visit and protect, at least for now
beats.v_share_museum: she leaves {FOUNDER}'s own {V_MAP} propped open on {GUARD}'s desk with a note, trusting {THRESHOLD} to follow it and finish what he started
beats.v_grab: {VD_OWL} on the nearest shelf would prove everything in an instant; her hand hovers over it, and she weighs taking it against leaving it be
beats.v_grab_run: {VD_OWL} in her bag, she bolts up {RA_STAIR}, but the shelf was pressure-set and a gentle chime of bells follows her all the way to the hall
beats.v_grab_return: she sets {VD_OWL} back on its velvet, deciding the truth is worth more than a trophy, and climbs out with only her notes and a clear conscience
beats.e_set_alarm: {GUARD}'s torch finds {HERO} standing in the open; kindly but firmly he walks her to the lobby to wait for a lift, the mystery left for another day; safe, a little embarrassed, no harm done
beats.e_set_locked_gallery: {B2_GATE}'s door clicks shut behind her and will not open from the inside; she settles on a bench to wait out the night, warm and safe, {FOUNDER}'s secret still hidden
beats.e_set_stuck_dark: blind in {C2_SIGN}, {HERO} loses all sense of direction and decides to sit tight until the lights come on at opening; uncomfortable and dusty, but perfectly safe, {ROUTE_C_VAULT} unopened
beats.e_set_broken_case: the glass cracks with a sharp snap and the noise brings {GUARD} at a run; nothing is hurt but the case, and {HERO} spends the rest of the night explaining herself in the lobby, {CODE} unread
beats.e_set_stuck_dome: high in {CA_DOME}'s dark the {CA_LADDER} ends at a bricked hatch; she climbs carefully back down and gives up the route, tired and dizzy but unhurt, {HUB} still out of reach tonight
beats.e_set_pendulum: she rushes and mistimes it; {CC_PENDULUM} bumps her back gently but firmly onto the safe side of the doorway, and she decides {CIPHER_C_PLACE} has beaten her for the night
beats.e_set_jammed_globe: forced too hard, the brass rings lock solid and will not turn either way; {RA_STAIR} stays shut, and {HERO} sits by the silent globe to wait for morning, so close and yet stuck
beats.e_set_caught: the ringing bells lead {GUARD} straight to her; red-faced, {HERO} hands back {VD_OWL} and puts everything right, let off with a stern word and a promise to return by daylight, the {GOAL} safe and the lesson learned
beats.e_set_dawn: lost in {V_MAP}'s every line, {HERO} looks up to find the sky already grey and the staff arriving; she slips out with the mystery only half-traced, promising herself she will come back and finish it properly
beats.e_win_secret_workshop: {FOUNDER}'s forgotten {RB_WORKSHOP} becomes {HERO}'s quiet triumph; she photographs the automata, leaves everything untouched, and by morning tells {CURATOR} of a whole lost room, a wonder no one knew survived; a warm, satisfying discovery
beats.e_win_mystery_solved: with {V_LETTER}, {VA_CATALOGUE}, and the whole truth, {HERO} walks into the morning and hands {FOUNDER}'s story back to the town; the lost {GOAL} is found, his name is cleared, and {THRESHOLD} will never be quite the same
beats.e_win_quiet_keeper: {HERO} leaves with only {FOUNDER}'s {V_LETTER} and a promise to honour it; in the weeks that follow she quietly guides {CURATOR} toward the truth, keeper of a trust she chose to carry gently
beats.e_win_lost_wing: {VB_WING} of lost paintings is {HERO}'s discovery to give; her photographs bring restorers and reporters, and the town crowds in to see what was hidden for a century
beats.e_win_hero_curator: at first light {CURATOR} listens open-mouthed, then leads a careful team down {RA_STAIR}; {HERO} is thanked as the girl who gave {FOUNDER}'s gift back to everyone, exactly as he wished
beats.e_win_secret_kept: the hidden {V_CHAMBER} becomes the treasured secret of {HERO} and her friends, a wonder they visit and guard together; it is theirs alone for now, a bond and a promise
beats.e_win_donate: {HERO} leaves {FOUNDER}'s own {V_MAP} open on the desk with a careful note; days later {THRESHOLD} follows it, finds the {GOAL}, and never learns whose small hands set them on the path
beats.e_neutral_call_home: {HERO} calls home from {GUARD}'s desk and waits in the warm lobby for a lift, the mystery half-solved and safe in her notebook; not the full triumph, but a good night's adventure and a promise to return; safe and content
beats.e_neutral_evidence: with {V_MAP} safe on her phone and {V_CHAMBER} left untouched, {HERO} slips out at dawn; she has proof enough to bring the right people back, and lets the grown-ups decide what happens next
beats.e_neutral_wiser: {HERO} leaves the treasures where they belong and climbs out with only her notes; she has not solved everything, but she has learned what she is willing to do and not do, and walks home wiser than she came

a_gems_alarm.c_alarm_hide: Duck behind a plinth as {GUARD} passes.

v_letter.c_letter_keep: Keep {V_LETTER} safe and leave the rest.

v_letter_keep.c_keep_end: Slip out with {V_LETTER} and a plan.
